0, 1), 20)\\n    if warmup_steps >= total_steps:\\n        return optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer, T_max=total_steps)\\n\\n    warmup = optim.lr_scheduler.LinearLR(\\n        optimizer,\\n        start_factor=0.2,\\n        end_factor=1.0,\\n        total_iters=warmup_steps,\\n    )\\n    cosine = optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(\\n        optimizer,\\n        T_max=total_steps - warmup_steps,\\n    )\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.SequentialLR(\\n        optimizer,\\n        schedulers=[warmup, cosine],\\n        milestones=[warmup_steps],\\n    )\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"summaries\",\"rationale\":\"Enable a step-aligned LR schedule with short warmup plus cosine decay over the fixed checker budget, which typically improves early optimization quality for MLPs under tight step limits.\",\"secondary_modes\":[\"topk\"]}"}}
